description_long: This object consists of a group of four pale, plump sausages arranged side by side on a rectangular yellow tray with a raised edge. The sausages are encased in a smooth, slightly glossy skin and are uniform in size and shape, suggesting they are processed and packaged. A clear plastic film tightly covers the tray, holding the sausages in place and providing a shiny, reflective surface. On top of the film, there is a rectangular label with text and possibly a barcode, indicating branding or product information. The tray itself appears to be made of lightweight plastic, and the overall presentation is typical of pre-packaged sausages found in supermarkets. No visible toppings or condiments are present, and the packaging is intact and unopened.
description: A set of four pale sausages in a yellow plastic tray, sealed with clear plastic film and topped with a product label.
description_view_0: The tray is seen from the side, showing the rounded tops of the sausages beneath the clear film and the label on top.
description_view_1: A top-down view reveals all four sausages, the yellow tray, and the rectangular label on the upper left corner of the packaging.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays the smooth, curved sides of the sausages and the label on the film.
description_view_3: Another top-down angle, similar to view 1, but from the opposite end, showing the sausages and the label's position.
attribute_packaging_type: plastic tray with clear plastic film
